contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Fastest route: the RFQ form asks the questions we would ask anyway.
contact.features: Email, WhatsApp and RFQ routing for Tucsenberg buyers

inquiryHandoff.title: Fastest route
inquiryHandoff.description: The RFQ form asks the questions we would ask anyway, so your quote comes back faster.

need.title: What you are protecting
need.description: Door, garage, driveway, loading dock, perimeter, stock or resale order, or other.

context.title: Dimensions
context.description: Opening width x height or run length, mounting surface or ground type, plus photos or drawings if available.

timing.title: Market and port
timing.description: Quantity, market, delivery port and timeline help us quote standard items within 12 hours and custom configurations within 48.

panel.emailUnavailable: Use the RFQ form if email is unavailable.
panel.prepareValue: Use the RFQ form; it asks the questions we'd ask anyway.

form.title: Send an enquiry
form.description: For the fastest quote, use Request a Quote. This form still reaches Tucsenberg.
form.subject: Subject
form.subjectPlaceholder: Product line, quantity, or site question
form.messagePlaceholder: Share product interest, quantity, market, delivery port, timeline, dimensions, or photos/drawings you can provide.
form.acceptPrivacy: I agree to the privacy policy and terms of service
form.marketingConsent: I would like to receive marketing communications
form.submitSuccess: Received. You'll hear from a person, not a sequence.
form.submitError: We couldn't send your message. Please try again shortly.
form.networkError: We could not submit the form. Please try again.
form.turnstilePending: Security verification is loading. You can send the form once it is ready.
form.turnstileFailed: Security verification did not complete. Please try again.
form.turnstileExpired: Security verification expired. Please complete it again.
form.success: Received. Standard items: quote within 12 hours. Custom: within 48. You'll hear from a person, not a sequence.
form.error: Sorry, there was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
form.loadError: The secure inquiry form could not load. Retry, or use the contact methods on this page.
form.rateLimitMessage: You've recently contacted us. Please wait a moment before sending another message.
